name: alien-metronome
description: A beautiful metronome app with delay, reverb, ring modulation and saturation effects.

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run copy && npm run icons
scripts.copy: cp index.html dist/ && cp manifest.json dist/ && cp sw.js dist/ && cp icon-192.png dist/ && cp icon-512.png dist/
scripts.cap:build:ios: cd ios/App && xcodebuild -workspace App.xcworkspace -scheme App -configuration Release -destination generic/platform=iPhone -archivePath build/App.xcarchive archive

author: William Thomason / Eloquenta
